text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Hey! Big news! This is, like, a huge deal!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I got double digits on my test!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: That's how hard I worked! I totes deserve a reward!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Swept along by Tosen Jordan's enthusiasm, I head
out with her to an amusement park to give her
both a break and a reward.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
What do you wanna ride? Should we do
something scary?! What do I do if my eyelashes
come off, though?!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Maybe we should just get some popcorn. I'm
getting amusement park overload!

text_block_list.name: Boy
text_block_list.text:
Heh, imagine getting all excited over something
like this.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: What was that?!

text_block_list.name: Boy
text_block_list.text:
I'm just saying it must be nice getting all excited
over something like this. I'm not having any fun at
all.

text_block_list.name: Boy
text_block_list.text:
I mean, this is all it takes for you? A bunch of kid
stuff?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Kid stuff?! Ohhh, I did not just hear that!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Now you've done it! Are you prepared to back
that up?! Get over here!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, so what did you think? The pirate ship was
something else, right?

text_block_list.name: Boy
text_block_list.text:
It just rocks back and forth. The scenery didn't
even change.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Wh-why you little...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Th-there... How'd you like my... full-throttle
teacup-spinning technique?

text_block_list.name: Boy
text_block_list.text: It just made me want to puke...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Yeah, same... A-anyway, what's next?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... See, amusement parks are totally fun!

text_block_list.name: Boy
text_block_list.text: Hmph! Umaland is obviously way better! And it's much more popular!

text_block_list.name: Boy
text_block_list.text:
Is this place really fun for you? How can you like
this at all?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
You know, it's not about if a place is, like, good
or bad.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I'm here today because I earned it, so I'm jazzed
no matter what kind of place it is.

text_block_list.name: Boy
text_block_list.text: You "earned" it?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Coming here is my prize for working hard! It's like
a super special treat!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Here, why don't you try and earn something? If
you can beat me at rock, paper, scissors, I'll buy
you an ice cream—well, my trainer will.

text_block_list.name: Boy
text_block_list.text:
Pass... You can buy that same ice cream
anywhere.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
That's not the point! Let's just do it! Rock, paper,
scissooors...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Shoot! Woo, I win!

text_block_list.name: Boy
text_block_list.text: What?! But you changed it at the last second!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
As if! I won fair and square. What? Wanna try
again?

text_block_list.name: Boy
text_block_list.text: Bring it on!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The rock, paper, scissors battle continues until
the boy manages to win.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Well?

text_block_list.name: Boy
text_block_list.text: ...It's good.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Right? That's the taste of victory. It's sweet. It's
like, you know... the feeling of earning something
yourself.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
You've gotta quit being a brat and start working
hard. And have fun!

text_block_list.name: Boy
text_block_list.text: Hmph... Fine, I'll try!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Sigh... What a little punk.
choice_data_list: You were a good influence on him.

Your test scores weren't exactly anything to
brag about...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
You think? Well, I do have a little sister. She's
better behaved, though. I guess I'm like a pro at
this whole big sister thing.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: But daycare is over! It's time to have some fun!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, Tosen Jordan continues to enjoy the
amusement park with a big, carefree grin on her
face.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
What's with the sucker punch?! You don't have to
come at me like that!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Besides... I wasn't lying when I said I worked hard.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Still, I'm not gonna let you make fun of me. I'm
gonna get a way better grade next time! Watch
me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Whatever her reasons may be, I find it endearing
how she can completely throw herself into
something.
